title: AI Answer Engine Citation Behavior: Bringing the GEO-16 Framework in B2B SaaS
authors: Arlen Kumar, Leanid Palkhouski (UC Berkeley, Wrodium Research)
abstract: AI answer engines are becoming primary distribution channels for B2B SaaS knowledge, yet determinants of which pages they cite remain under-studied. This paper introduces GEO-16, a 16-pillar auditing framework that quantifies page quality signals relevant to citation behavior. Using 70 industry-targeted prompts, 1702 citations were harvested from Brave, Google AIO, and Perplexity, auditing 1100 unique URLs. Each page was scored 0-3 per pillar and aggregated to a normalized GEO score. Engines differ markedly in the GEO quality of pages they cite (mean G: Brave 0.727, Google AIO 0.687, Perplexity 0.300). The pillars most strongly associated with citation are Metadata & Freshness, Semantic HTML, and Structured Data. Pages with G >= 0.70 and >=12 pillar hits achieve a 78% cross-engine citation rate.
key_findings: Metadata & Freshness is the single strongest predictor of AI engine citation (r=0.68, +47% citation impact)
Semantic HTML structure (r=0.65, +42% impact) and Structured Data/JSON-LD (r=0.63, +39% impact) are top-3 pillars
Pages with G >= 0.70 and >=12 pillar hits achieve 78% cross-engine citation rate — a practical operating threshold
Brave cites highest-quality pages (mean G=0.727), Perplexity cites lowest (mean G=0.300); engines have distinct signal preferences
Cross-engine citations (134 URLs) exhibit 71% higher quality scores than single-engine citations
Earned media on authoritative third-party domains is critical — even high-quality vendor blogs may not be cited without it

extracted_strategies.name: GEO-16 Pillar Optimization: Metadata & Freshness First
extracted_strategies.what: Prioritize machine-readable recency signals: visible publish/modified dates, JSON-LD datePublished/dateModified, sitemap freshness, changelog entries. Set up a last-reviewed datestamp on every page.
extracted_strategies.why: Metadata & Freshness has the strongest correlation with AI citation (r=0.68, +47% impact). AI engines weight recency heavily for time-sensitive queries and trust signals.
extracted_strategies.how: Add JSON-LD with datePublished and dateModified to all pages. Display human-visible 'Last updated: YYYY-MM-DD' near the title. Update sitemaps with current lastmod. Maintain a visible changelog for substantive revisions.
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 引用率+40-50%（论文量化：+47% citation impact）
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: Probe报告中检查AI是否引用你的时间戳内容；搜索你的页面时观察各引擎是否展示日期

extracted_strategies.name: Semantic HTML Hierarchy Enforcement
extracted_strategies.what: Maintain a single <h1> with logical <h2>/<h3> hierarchy. Ensure heading structure reflects document organization. Use semantic elements (<article>, <section>, <nav>) consistently.
extracted_strategies.why: Semantic HTML is the #2 strongest citation predictor (r=0.65, +42% impact). AI engines parse heading hierarchy to understand document structure, improving extractability and reducing parsing errors.
extracted_strategies.how: Audit every page: exactly one <h1> (page title), nested <h2> for major sections, <h3> for subsections. No skipped heading levels. Validate with W3C validator or browser developer tools. Add descriptive anchor IDs for deep linking.
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 引用率+40%（论文量化：+42% citation impact）
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 用SEO爬虫(如Screaming Frog)检查heading结构；Probe报告中观察结构化提取质量

extracted_strategies.name: Complete Structured Data Implementation (JSON-LD)
extracted_strategies.what: Implement valid JSON-LD structured data: Article/TechArticle/FAQPage with datePublished, dateModified, author, breadcrumb. Ensure schema matches visible content. Validate with Google Rich Results Test.
extracted_strategies.why: Structured Data is the #3 citation predictor (r=0.63, +39% impact). Machine-readable cues (JSON-LD, schema) improve AI engine understanding and ranking in retrieval.
extracted_strategies.how: Add JSON-LD script to <head>: Article schema with headline, datePublished, dateModified, author, publisher. FAQPage schema for Q&A content. BreadcrumbList for navigation. Validate with https://validator.schema.org/ or Google Rich Results Test. Fix all errors and warnings.
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 引用率+35-40%（论文量化：+39% citation impact）
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: Google Rich Results Test全部通过；Probe报告中检查结构化数据是否被正确解析

extracted_strategies.name: Dual Strategy: On-Page Excellence + Earned Media Coverage
extracted_strategies.what: Combine GEO-16 on-page optimization with strategic third-party coverage. Secure citations on authoritative domains (.gov/.edu/industry publications). Don't rely solely on owned blog content.
extracted_strategies.why: Even high-quality pages on vendor blogs may not be cited. AI engines heavily weight earned media and often exclude brand-owned platforms. Cross-engine citations score 71% higher quality — appearing across engines requires both on-page quality and off-page authority.
extracted_strategies.how: Pursue dual strategy: (1) meet GEO-16 thresholds (G>=0.70, >=12 pillar hits); (2) cultivate earned media relationships — pitch to industry publications, secure guest posts on authoritative domains, get listed in trusted directories. Diversify content distribution across platforms.
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 跨引擎引用可能性提升71%
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 追踪品牌在多个AI引擎中的引用率；使用Probe对比on-page优化前后的跨引擎表现

anti_patterns.name: Ignoring Structural Signals
anti_patterns.what: Focusing only on body text quality while neglecting metadata, semantic HTML, and structured data
anti_patterns.impact: Missing out on top-3 citation predictors, resulting in significantly lower AI engine visibility
anti_patterns.why: AI engines rely heavily on machine-readable structure; body text alone is insufficient

key_metrics.top_pillars: Metadata & Freshness (r=0.68), Semantic HTML (r=0.65), Structured Data (r=0.63)
key_metrics.citation_threshold: G >= 0.70 + >=12 pillar hits = 78% cross-engine citation rate
key_metrics.engine_performance: Brave 0.727 mean G, Google AIO 0.687, Perplexity 0.300
key_metrics.cross_engine_premium: Cross-engine citations show 71% higher quality scores than single-engine
